target: full game v2.0.2 — discord community patch

patches.name: udp_jnz_to_jz
patches.description: Flips JNZ to JZ at 0x4479BE — inverts a conditional branch in the UDP networking path. Required for compatibility with the C# community server. Vanilla (unpatched) client works with our Python server instead.
patches.note: JNZ rel8 -> JZ rel8. Single byte change. Unpatched=works with Python server, patched=works with C# server.
